empty_state.heading: Not set up yet
empty_state.body: Information Classification is not set up on this Confluence site. A Confluence administrator needs to pick classification levels before this app can be used.

classify.title: Change Classification
classify.all_subpages_classified: All sub-pages already at this level.
classify.async_started: Classifying {total} page(s) as {level} in the background...
classify.async_complete_partial: Classification complete: {classified} page(s) changed to {level}, {failed} failed. Check the page restrictions or retry.
classify.async_remaining: {count} pages were added or modified during processing.
classify.async_close_hint: Closing this dialog pauses the classification. Resume it later from any page.
classify.stop_confirm_message: Stop the classification? {classified} page(s) already changed to {level} will stay as they are. Remaining pages won't be updated. This can't be undone.
classify.paused: Classification paused. Resume from any page.
classify.queued: Added to the queue (position {position}). It will start after the current job finishes.
classify.stopped: Classification stopped. {classified} page(s) were changed to {level}.
classify.aborted_level_deleted: Classification stopped: the target level was removed. {classified} page(s) were already changed.
classify.aborted_level_disallowed: Classification stopped: the target level is no longer allowed. {classified} page(s) were already changed.
classify.success_recursive_partial: Classification of {classified} page(s) changed to {level} ({failed} failed, timed out).
classify.requires_protection_share: Use the Share button to restrict access.
classify.has_unnecessary_protection: This page has access restrictions, but the classification level does not require them. Consider removing restrictions or changing the classification.

bulkClassify.title: Bulk Classify
bulkClassify.description: Reclassify every page currently at a chosen level to a new level. Runs as you, respecting page restrictions.
bulkClassify.preview_count: {count} page(s) currently at {source} will be moved.
bulkClassify.save_blocked: A long-running job is in progress. Saving configuration is disabled until it finishes — stop it from the banner above if you need to save now.
bulkClassify.error_scope_conflict: Another classification job with an overlapping page scope is already running or queued. Stop it first or choose different levels.

about.description: Classify Confluence pages with configurable levels, restriction warnings, and an audit trail.
about.status_older_major: A newer major version is available. You or a site admin must approve the upgrade.
about.tracking: We don't track usage and don't know if and how you are using Information Classification for Confluence — that's why we especially appreciate your {feedback} or {review}.
about.documentation: For further information refer to the {documentation}.

levels.title: Classification Levels
levels.delete_bulk_classify_hint: Move them to another level with Bulk Classify, or delete the level anyway — those pages will retain a level that no longer exists.
levels.name: Name
levels.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this level?

validation.at_least_one: At least one allowed level is required.

links.title: Links
links.search_page_hint: Type at least 2 characters to search
links.label: Label

import.title: Synchronize from Labels
import.no_pages_found: No pages found with the selected labels in this scope.
import.to_classify_tooltip: Upper bound. Pages already classified to a more restrictive level will not be updated.
import.nothing_to_classify_hint: All labeled pages are already at the target level. Nothing to classify.
import.scope_empty: Enter one or more space keys to scope the import.
import.remove_labels_help: After synchronization, labels no longer reflect actual classifications — changes via the app won't update labels. Stale labels mislead users. This is reversible: a log is saved, and you can synchronize classifications back to labels anytime.
import.remove_labels_atomic: Labels are removed per-page. If interrupted, re-run to resume.
import.never_weaken: Pages already classified at a more restrictive level will not be downgraded.
import.index_lag_hint: Matched page counts may take up to a minute to reflect recent changes. If numbers look unexpected, refresh until they stabilize.
import.settling_hint: Waiting for Confluence's label index to catch up — Start stays disabled until counts stabilize.
import.paused_banner: Paused import from label(s) {labels}: {classified} of {total} pages processed. Resume to continue.
import.complete: Import complete: {classified} pages classified from label(s) {labels}.

export.title: Synchronize to Labels
export.description: Add page labels based on current classifications. This lets you return to label-based classification at any time.
export.nothing_to_label_hint: All classified pages already carry the target label. Nothing to label.
export.settling_hint: Waiting for Confluence's label index to catch up — Start stays disabled until counts stabilize.
export.paused_banner: Paused export to label(s) {labels}: {classified} of {total} pages processed. Resume to continue.
export.no_classifications: No pages are currently classified. Classify pages first, then export their classifications as labels.

languages.title: Content Languages
languages.description: Configure which languages are available for classification level names, descriptions, and other translatable content.
languages.english_required: English is always required as the fallback language.
languages.already_added: This language has already been added.

admin.access_denied_message: Only Confluence site administrators can configure Information Classification.

bootstrap.title: Set up classification levels
bootstrap.subtitle: Pick a starting template for your classification scheme. You can rename, reorder, remove, or add levels afterwards.

space_settings.title: Information Classification Settings
space_settings.description: Configure which classification levels are available in this space.
space_settings.reset_success: Space settings reset to global defaults.
space_settings.not_configured_message: A Confluence site administrator must pick a classification scheme before space-level settings become available.

stats.title: Information Classification Statistics
stats.description: Displays classification distribution and recently classified pages.
stats.empty: No classified pages found in this scope.

license.inactive_message: Information Classification for Confluence requires an active license. Please install or renew your license in the Atlassian Marketplace.
